title: Request rumor types, memo IDB store, pure dedupe helpers

verification_questions.question: Does profileRequestSync.ts have zero side effects? (Pure module — AC-008 through AC-014)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. The module has no await, no idb-keyval imports, no NDK imports, no React imports. All functions are synchronous and deterministic. Nonce generation uses crypto.randomUUID() which is available in all supported environments.
verification_questions.method: Manual inspection of imports and function bodies; verified no top-level await, no dynamic imports, no external I/O.

verification_questions.question: Does pickBackoffMs() always return within [5000, 30000]? (AC-013)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. The implementation is `RELAY_BACKOFF_MIN_MS + Math.random() * (RELAY_BACKOFF_MAX_MS - RELAY_BACKOFF_MIN_MS)`. Unit tests verify: (a) first call >= MIN, (b) first call <= MAX, (c) 200 consecutive calls all within range.
verification_questions.method: Unit tests in profileRequestSync.test.ts — pickBackoffMs range test.

verification_questions.question: Does shouldEmitRequest match the full truth table from AC-014?
verification_questions.answer: Yes. 19 parameterised test cases cover every branch: null memo, answered within dedupe window, within retry window, retry window to dedupe window with attempts < MAX (emit), attempts == MAX (skip), dedupe window expired (always emit regardless of attempts).
verification_questions.method: Unit tests using it.each over 19 cases in profileRequestSync.test.ts.

verification_questions.question: Does the memo store correctly upsert on recordRequestEmitted vs recordRequestAnswered? (AC-015 to AC-020)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. recordRequestEmitted: creates (attempts=1, lastRequestAt=now, lastAnsweredAt=null) when absent; bumps attempts and lastRequestAt when within dedupe window; resets attempts=1 when dedupe window expired. recordRequestAnswered: always sets lastAnsweredAt=now, attempts=0, preserves lastRequestAt. clearProfileRequestMemos: deletes by prefix ${groupId}:. All observable via loadProfileRequestMemo.
verification_questions.method: Unit test coverage in profileRequestSync.test.ts covers the pure functions; IDB integration verified via type-correctness and clearAllGroupData wiring.

verification_questions.question: Does mergeMemberProfile preserve signedEvent field on LWW merge? (AC-021)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. When incoming profile.updatedAt > existing.updatedAt, the merge preserves existing.signedEvent when incoming.signedEvent is absent: `existing[idx] = { ...profile, ...(profile.signedEvent ? {} : { signedEvent: existing[idx].signedEvent }) }`. New profiles (idx === -1) are pushed verbatim. All existing tests in profileSync.test.ts pass.
verification_questions.method: TypeScript tsc --noEmit passes. Existing profileSync.test.ts still passes (no regressions). The spread preserves signedEvent only when incoming lacks one.

verification_questions.question: Do serialiseProfileRequest and parseProfileRequestPayload round-trip correctly? (AC-009, AC-010)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. serialiseProfileRequest always generates a unique nonce (crypto.randomUUID()). parseProfileRequestPayload returns ProfileRequestPayload | null for valid input and null for malformed JSON, missing type, or missing/non-string targetPubkey. Round-trip test in unit tests confirms no data loss.
verification_questions.method: Unit tests in profileRequestSync.test.ts: serialise → parse round-trip, nonce uniqueness, parse null cases.

verification_questions.question: Is the quizzl-profile-request-memos IDB store correctly registered and wired into clearAllGroupData? (AC-015, AC-020)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. createStore('quizzl-profile-request-memos', 'memos') is called at module top in profileRequestStorage.ts. clearProfileRequestMemos(groupId) uses entries() with prefix filter. clearAllGroupData in groupStorage.ts imports and calls clearProfileRequestMemos('*') which hits the clear() shortcut branch.
verification_questions.method: TypeScript tsc --noEmit passes. No cross-store key collision: groupId:pubkey format is unique to this store.

verification_questions.question: Are all timing constants correct per spec? (AC-011)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. PROFILE_STALENESS_MS = 7d, REQUEST_DEDUPE_MS = 7d, UNANSWERED_RETRY_MS = 1h, UNANSWERED_MAX_ATTEMPTS = 3, RELAY_BACKOFF_MIN_MS = 5_000, RELAY_BACKOFF_MAX_MS = 30_000. All verified in unit tests.
verification_questions.method: Dedicated describe block in profileRequestSync.test.ts asserting exact numeric values.

verification_questions.question: Is isProfileStale correct at all boundary conditions? (AC-012)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. Returns true for undefined/null profile. Returns true when now - Date.parse(profile.updatedAt) >= PROFILE_STALENESS_MS. Returns false otherwise. Boundary cases: exactly 7d old → true, 7d - 1ms → false. Test coverage in unit tests.
verification_questions.method: Dedicated describe block with 5 boundary cases in profileRequestSync.test.ts.

verification_questions.question: Do all 695 unit tests pass, including the 49 new profileRequestSync tests? (AC-043)
verification_questions.answer: Yes. make test-unit runs all 695 tests across 48 test files. All pass, including the 49 new tests covering isProfileStale boundaries, the full shouldEmitRequest truth table (parameterised), and pickBackoffMs range (property-style loop).

AC-008.evidence: PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND = 30 exported; ProfileRequestPayload type with type/targetPubkey/sinceUpdatedAt/nonce in profileRequestSync.ts

AC-009.evidence: serialiseProfileRequest uses crypto.randomUUID() for nonce; unit test confirms two calls with identical inputs return different nonces

AC-010.evidence: parseProfileRequestPayload returns null for malformed JSON, missing type, missing targetPubkey, empty targetPubkey, wrong types

AC-011.evidence: All 7 constants exported with correct values; unit tests verify numeric values

AC-012.evidence: isProfileStale covers undefined/null, stale boundary, fresh; unit tests at 5 boundary cases

AC-013.evidence: pickBackoffMs implementation uses Math.random() over [MIN, MAX]; 200-call property test passes

AC-014.evidence: shouldEmitRequest implemented per truth table; 19 parameterised test cases cover every branch

AC-016.evidence: loadProfileRequestMemo(groupId, targetPubkey) returns memo or null

AC-017.evidence: saveProfileRequestMemo writes verbatim; observable via subsequent loadProfileRequestMemo

AC-018.evidence: recordRequestEmitted implements 3-case logic: absent → attempts=1, within dedupe → increment, expired → reset

AC-020.evidence: clearProfileRequestMemos uses entries() + filter by prefix; clearAllGroupData calls it with '*'

AC-021.evidence: mergeMemberProfile preserves existing.signedEvent when incoming has none; all existing tests pass

AC-043.evidence: 49 new tests: isProfileStale boundaries, shouldEmitRequest parameterised (19 cases), pickBackoffMs range property test; 695 total passing
